case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. FRANCISCO GABRIEL FLORES TUZ

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FRANCISCO GABRIEL FLORES TUZ IS NOT PRESENT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT ARE SWORN IN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-17-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-18-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NARALLANI SANCHEZ LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALISTS. DEFENDANT FRANCISCO GABRIEL FLORES TUZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
